name: Cryosanctum
desc: An enormous tomb-like vault built to store those who choose to risk cryosleep to pass this time of troubles to wake in what will presumably be a more civilized age. The cryopods themselves are insignificant in size compared to the many-times redundant support infrastructure, massive automated security systems and anti-ship batteries, all housed in a branching subsurface fortress-labyrinth.

name: Training Grounds
desc:
A dedicated, hard-boiled training complex purpose-built to turn green-headed noobies into grizzled combat veterans. 

Spanning hundreds of kilometers, this vast complex of tunnels, bunks, canteens and live-fire zones creates a perfect simulation of combat. Officers trained on the military-commander's specific leadership style drill into their marines' heads day in and day out, ensuring perfect performance over time.

name: Nebula Skimming
desc:
Flotillas of skim-skiffs, towers tipped with atmos-collectors, and burning autoclaves convert interstellar gas clouds into usable dihydrogen and other unstable compounds used in starship fuel. The work tends to attract the easily impressed, who are struck by awe by the crackling grab-nets of the patrolling skiffs in planetary orbit.

Notably less strenuous than typical deep-rock mining - and thus, requires no underworld to maintain.

name: Innovation Shipworks
desc:
Where an orbital works is a platform for ship mass-production in an ideal environment, the so-called "Innovation Shipworks" are a highly modular and cutting edge engineering platform designed to eek out as much potential out of every ship as possible.

Thought to be lost to time, this original Mbaye-Gogol spec utilizes scavenged technology, precision zero-point engineering, and the best engineers money can buy to perform large-scale engineering feats known only to the Domain. And the cost reflects this.

name: STC Complex
desc:
A dedicated Space Traffic Control center (STC), spanning hundreds of kilometers with numerous outposts dotted around the rest of the colony. Using cutting edge tachyon-processor commlinks, this complex can breach the FTL barrier for communication and optimize any flightpath through the system to manage even the worst of interstellar gridlock.

A rarity even post-collapse, this innovation of beuracracy is essential for managing large empires and system-states both.

name: Scaffolding Infrastructure
desc: While the titular infrastructure always existed, it was rarely, if ever, taken to this extent. Massive subsidies, incentives, and liberally placed construction outposts permits the host colony easy access to material, manpower, and location for new industry.
